svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 135px; height: 1px; padding-top: 41px; margin-left: 6px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #A3EA2A;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: "Source Sans Pro"; color: #A3EA2A; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
